description_long: This is a single low-top canvas sneaker, predominantly white in color, with visible signs of wear and dirt, especially around the toe and sole. The shoe features a classic lace-up design with metal eyelets and white laces, some of which are loosely tied. A thin red stripe runs along the midsole, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise plain exterior. The canvas upper appears slightly frayed and creased, indicating frequent use, while the rubber sole shows scuff marks and discoloration. The interior lining is visible and appears to be made of fabric, with the heel area showing some deformation. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A worn, white low-top canvas sneaker with a red-striped sole, metal eyelets, and white laces, showing visible dirt and fraying.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shoe, red stripe on the sole, and visible wear and creasing on the canvas upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, laces, and scuffed front edge of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shoe's profile, red stripe, and less pronounced wear compared to the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, deformation of the collar, and the red stripe wrapping around the back.
